description: Portable, safe, local operational capabilities for Clawksis.

security_model.principle: Clawksis should call safe capabilities instead of executing arbitrary shell commands.
security_model.secrets_policy: Do not read, print, store, or commit secrets.

capabilities.name: safe-command-execution
capabilities.description: Runs only predefined safe intents through Hermes Lite.

capabilities.name: health-json
capabilities.description: Generates machine-readable health information for local operations.

capabilities.name: doctor
capabilities.description: Runs diagnostics for local operations, tests, and security checks.

capabilities.name: bootstrap
capabilities.description: Prepares portable runtime directories and permissions.

capabilities.name: security-audit
capabilities.description: Scans local ops files for unsafe execution patterns, secrets, and private keys.

capabilities.name: quality-gate
capabilities.description: Runs the full local validation gate before future commits or deployments.

capabilities.name: repo-status
capabilities.description: Report current branch, modified files, upstream, dirty state, and last commits without modifying the repository.

capabilities.name: service-status
capabilities.description: Read status of explicitly allowed local services without modifying or restarting them.

capabilities.name: safe-logs
capabilities.description: Read only approved log files with line limits and secret redaction.

capabilities.name: system-health
capabilities.description: Report CPU load, memory, disk, uptime, OS, Python, and current user without modifying the system.

capabilities.name: client-report
capabilities.description: Generate a client-safe product summary without exposing secrets, internal users, hostnames, raw logs, or repository internals.

capabilities.name: customer-insights
capabilities.description: Analyze customer concentration, top customers, repeat customers, and one-time buyers from a sales CSV.

capabilities.name: product-performance
capabilities.description: Analyze product revenue, units sold, discounts, concentration, and low-performing products from a sales CSV.

capabilities.name: sales-rep-performance
capabilities.description: Analyze sales representative revenue, orders, average ticket, discounts, and concentration from a sales CSV.

capabilities.name: executive-summary
capabilities.description: Combine sales, customer, product, and sales-rep reports into an executive commercial summary.

capabilities.name: ventas
capabilities.description: Comando corto en español para generar reportes comerciales de ventas: ejecutivo, semanal, clientes, productos o vendedores.
